title: ononis natrix subsp. polyclada
intro: Ononis natrix subsp. polyclada, also known as the Spiny Restharrow or Ononis natrix subsp. polyclada, is a perennial plant species in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits associated with Ononis natrix subsp. polyclada include its potential use in treating urinary issues and digestive problems, as well as its ability to act as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and have been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
